text.title: E-commerce Checkout BA Pack Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid E-commerce Checkout BA Pack output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim narrative fields to ≤500 chars preserving named entities + numeric claims.
Promote a 'no decision yet' state to status='pending' rather than fabricating a decision.

list.item: pci_scope populated with a typed value
vat_table populated with a typed value
fraud_table populated with a typed value
abandonment_machine populated with a typed value
returns_flow populated with a typed value
owner populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
